body.title: Create devlab Postgres schema — initial tables
body.result: created devlab schema (constraints + tickets tables) via idempotent migration; fixed pre-existing GrannyWeatherwaxDevice abstract method gap
body.intention: I intend that devlab exists as a first-class Postgres schema with at minimum a constraints table, so constraint normalizer and future devlab writers have a real home.
body.description:
clan.memories is overloaded with operational dev data. The devlab schema establishes a clean namespace for project-dev operational data.

Create schema devlab in Igor-wild-0001 Postgres. Initial tables:
- devlab.constraints (id, text, kind, severity, applies_to jsonb, source jsonb, implies jsonb[], created_at, updated_at)
- devlab.tickets stub (id, status) — just enough for cc_queue writer migration to follow

**Affected files:** new SQL migration file (lab/claudecode/migrations/ or inline psql); day-close-audit schema check (add devlab tables to required set)
**Design rules:** no SQLite; external state; Postgres only
**Scope boundary:** IN — CREATE SCHEMA devlab; CREATE TABLE devlab.constraints; devlab.tickets stub. OUT — migrating existing clan data; updating writers.
**Completion criteria:** psql SELECT schema_name FROM information_schema.schemata WHERE schema_name = devlab returns devlab; SELECT table_name FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_schema = devlab includes constraints with correct columns.
